hero.title: DragonSword: Awakening Wiki
hero.description: DragonSword: Awakening is an anime-style open world action RPG featuring tag-team combat, 19 unique heroes, exploration across the Continent of Orbis, and a fantasy story about awakening the legendary Dragon Sword.

gameFeature.title: DragonSword Awakening Gameplay
gameFeature.description: Master tag-team combat with 19 unique heroes, explore the open world of the Continent of Orbis, and uncover a fantasy story about awakening the legendary Dragon Sword in this anime action RPG on Steam.

dragonswordBeginnerGuide.title: DragonSword Awakening Beginner Guide
dragonswordBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the essential systems before starting your journey across Orbis. Understand combat, heroes, exploration, and early progression.
dragonswordBeginnerGuide.intro: This beginner guide explains the recommended first steps for new players entering DragonSword: Awakening. It covers the core action RPG systems, including tag-team combat, status ailments, hero recruitment, and character growth.

steps.title: Starting Your Adventure
steps.description: Begin your journey by learning the basic controls, exploring the opening areas, and choosing a comfortable difficulty setting. Focus on understanding movement, combat flow, and the game's action-based mechanics.

steps.title: Combat Basics
steps.description: Master basic attacks, defensive actions, and the Status Ailment tag-team system. Switching heroes at the right moment allows you to create stronger attack chains and exploit enemy weaknesses.

steps.title: Understanding Status Ailments
steps.description: Learn how status effects influence battles and how different heroes can combine their abilities. Applying ailments before switching characters is a key part of efficient combat.

steps.title: Recruiting Heroes
steps.description: Build your team by unlocking playable heroes and companions through game progression. Experiment with different party combinations to find effective combat roles.

steps.title: Exploring Orbis
steps.description: Explore the open world of the Continent of Orbis to discover quests, resources, enemies, and hidden locations. Exploration helps you gather materials and improve your party.

steps.title: Progression and Upgrades
steps.description: Upgrade heroes, improve equipment, and strengthen your team as challenges become harder. Regularly investing resources into your main party improves overall performance.

dragonswordCharactersGuide.title: DragonSword Awakening Characters Guide
dragonswordCharactersGuide.subtitle: Understand playable heroes, companions, and combat roles to create a balanced party.
dragonswordCharactersGuide.intro: DragonSword: Awakening features a roster of playable heroes and companions that can be obtained through gameplay. This guide explains common team roles and how different character types contribute during battles.

cards.title: Lute
cards.description: The young protagonist and central hero of the adventure. Lute represents the player's journey through Orbis and serves as a key member of the party.

cards.title: Mercenary Companions
cards.description: Unique allies recruited during the adventure who provide different combat styles, abilities, and tactical options for team building.

cards.title: Spellcasters
cards.description: Magic-focused heroes who specialize in powerful abilities, battlefield control, and applying status effects to enemies.

cards.title: Warrior Tanks
cards.description: Durable frontline fighters designed to absorb damage, protect allies, and maintain control during difficult encounters.

cards.title: Support Healers
cards.description: Support-oriented heroes who assist the team through recovery abilities, buffs, and defensive utility.

cards.title: Ranged DPS
cards.description: Long-distance damage dealers who attack safely from range and provide consistent damage against various enemies.

dragonswordCombatGuide.title: DragonSword Awakening Combat Guide
dragonswordCombatGuide.subtitle: Master tag-team action, status effects, combos, and advanced battle strategies.
dragonswordCombatGuide.intro: DragonSword: Awakening uses action RPG combat built around real-time battles, hero switching, and strategic ability combinations. Understanding each combat system helps players defeat stronger enemies efficiently.

cards.title: Tag-Team Switching
cards.description: Switch between heroes during combat to create continuous attacks and activate strategic combinations. Timing character swaps around enemy openings is essential.

cards.title: Status Ailments
cards.description: Use different abilities to apply status effects and create opportunities for stronger follow-up attacks. Status-based strategies are central to team synergy.

cards.title: Combos and Chains
cards.description: Combine normal attacks, skills, and character changes to create longer attack sequences. Effective combos increase damage output and combat control.

cards.title: Dodging and Parrying
cards.description: Avoid enemy attacks with precise defensive timing and create openings for counterattacks. Defensive awareness is important against powerful enemies.

cards.title: Elemental Weaknesses
cards.description: Use appropriate abilities and character choices to exploit enemy weaknesses. Adjusting your team for different opponents improves battle efficiency.

cards.title: Ultimate Skills
cards.description: Powerful abilities provide burst damage and major combat advantages. Saving ultimate skills for important moments can turn difficult battles around.

dragonswordWalkthrough.title: DragonSword Awakening Walkthrough
dragonswordWalkthrough.subtitle: Follow the main adventure from the dragon's return to the final confrontation.
dragonswordWalkthrough.intro: This walkthrough provides a structured overview of the expected story progression in DragonSword: Awakening. It highlights major adventure stages, exploration goals, and party development milestones.

steps.title: Prologue: The Dragon Returns
steps.description: Begin the adventure as the legendary dragon threat returns after decades of peace. Learn the world background and the events that start Lute's journey.

steps.title: Joining the Mercenaries
steps.description: Join a mercenary group and meet allies who become important companions. Learn the basics of teamwork and party-based combat.

steps.title: First Quests and Orbis Exploration
steps.description: Complete early missions while exploring the Continent of Orbis. Discover locations, gather resources, and become familiar with the open world.

steps.title: Recruiting Your Party
steps.description: Expand your team by obtaining new heroes and companions through progression. Build a balanced party that matches your preferred playstyle.

steps.title: Major Story Beats
steps.description: Advance through important narrative events, challenging battles, and discoveries across Orbis. Continue improving your heroes as enemies become stronger.

steps.title: Endgame and Dragon Confrontation
steps.description: Prepare your strongest team for the final challenges and confront the legendary dragon threat. Use advanced combat strategies and optimized builds.

dragonswordHeroTierList.title: DragonSword Awakening Hero Tier List
dragonswordHeroTierList.subtitle: Rank playable heroes by combat value, team synergy, and usefulness in different battle situations.
dragonswordHeroTierList.intro: This tier list helps players understand which heroes and companion roles are most effective for exploration, boss fights, and team-based combat. Rankings focus on damage output, survivability, utility, and compatibility with the status ailment tag-team system.

tiers.name: Lute
tiers.description: The main protagonist and core combat character with flexible abilities, strong story importance, and excellent synergy with different team compositions.

tiers.name: Dragon Affinity Heroes
tiers.description: Top-level heroes with powerful abilities and strong damage potential, especially effective against difficult enemies and major encounters.

tiers.name: Warrior Companions
tiers.description: Reliable frontline fighters with high durability and consistent melee performance during exploration and boss battles.

tiers.name: Spellcaster Heroes
tiers.description: Strong ranged damage dealers that provide elemental attacks and useful status ailment applications.

tiers.name: Support Heroes
tiers.description: Balanced characters that improve team survival through healing, buffs, and combat utility.

tiers.name: Beginner-Friendly Heroes
tiers.description: Accessible characters with simple mechanics that are useful during early progression and learning combat systems.

dragonswordWeaponsAndBuilds.title: DragonSword Awakening Weapons and Builds Guide
dragonswordWeaponsAndBuilds.subtitle: Discover recommended weapon styles and combat setups for different playstyles.
dragonswordWeaponsAndBuilds.intro: DragonSword Awakening features action-focused combat where weapon choices, character roles, and team combinations influence performance. These builds provide examples for damage, defense, and cooperative gameplay approaches.

cards.title: Dragon Sword Build
cards.description: A balanced melee setup focused on sword attacks, reliable combos, and flexible tag-team switching during battles.

cards.title: Dual Blades Build
cards.description: A fast attacking playstyle that focuses on mobility, rapid strikes, and exploiting enemy openings.

cards.title: Staff Build
cards.description: A magic-focused setup designed around ranged attacks, elemental abilities, and applying status effects.

cards.title: Tank Defense Build
cards.description: A defensive configuration prioritizing survivability, damage resistance, and protecting teammates during difficult fights.

cards.title: Glass Cannon DPS Build
cards.description: A high-risk damage setup that maximizes offensive power for players who prefer aggressive combat.

cards.title: Co-op Support Build
cards.description: A team-oriented setup focused on healing, buffs, crowd control, and helping allies in cooperative content.

dragonswordReleaseGuide.title: DragonSword Awakening Release Guide
dragonswordReleaseGuide.subtitle: Official release details, development information, and available features.
dragonswordReleaseGuide.intro: This release guide summarizes the key information about DragonSword: Awakening, including its developer, platform, release schedule, technology, and gameplay availability.

rows.label: Platform
rows.value: Steam PC release as a premium buy-to-play action RPG.

rows.label: Developer
rows.value: Developed by Korean game studio HOUND13.

rows.label: Price Model
rows.value: Premium buy-to-play game with an expected price around $60.

rows.label: Playable Heroes
rows.value: Features 19 playable heroes and companions obtainable through gameplay progression.

dragonswordSecretsGuide.title: DragonSword Awakening Secrets Guide
dragonswordSecretsGuide.subtitle: Find optional discoveries, hidden rewards, and exploration content across Orbis.
dragonswordSecretsGuide.intro: The open world of DragonSword Awakening encourages exploration beyond the main story. This guide highlights the types of hidden content players can discover while completing quests and exploring the continent.

cards.title: Hidden Companions
cards.description: Optional companion encounters that reward players who explore different areas and complete additional objectives.

cards.title: Secret Areas in Orbis
cards.description: Hidden locations containing exploration rewards, special encounters, and additional world-building content.

cards.title: Rare Weapons
cards.description: Special equipment discoveries that provide unique combat options and encourage exploration.

cards.title: Easter Eggs
cards.description: Optional references, hidden interactions, and developer-inspired surprises throughout the game world.

cards.title: Lore Documents
cards.description: Collectible story materials that expand the history of dragons, Orbis, and the game's characters.

cards.title: Optional Bosses
cards.description: Powerful hidden enemies that challenge experienced players and provide additional rewards.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about DragonSword: Awakening

questions.question: Is DragonSword: Awakening a single-player game?
questions.answer: Yes. DragonSword: Awakening is a single-player anime action RPG focused on story, exploration, and tag-team hero combat.

questions.question: What platforms is DragonSword: Awakening available on?
questions.answer: DragonSword: Awakening is a premium buy-to-play game releasing on Steam for PC.

questions.question: How many playable heroes does DragonSword: Awakening have?
questions.answer: DragonSword: Awakening features 19 playable heroes and companions that you can recruit and switch between during tag-team combat.

questions.question: What is the tag-team combat system in DragonSword: Awakening?
questions.answer: DragonSword: Awakening uses real-time action combat where you switch between heroes mid-battle to chain attacks, apply status ailments, and trigger strategic combinations.

questions.question: Is DragonSword: Awakening an open world game?
questions.answer: Yes. DragonSword: Awakening is an open world action RPG set on the Continent of Orbis, with quests, resources, enemies, and hidden locations to discover.

questions.question: Who developed DragonSword: Awakening?
questions.answer: DragonSword: Awakening is developed by HOUND13, a Korean game studio, using Unreal Engine 5 technology.

cta.title: Ready to Play DragonSword: Awakening?
cta.description: Join the DragonSword: Awakening community on Reddit and Steam for hero guides, build tips, patch notes, and discussions!
